name: firecomploy
description: Digital compliance records for commercial kitchen exhaust systems

scripts.deploy:functions: supabase functions deploy notify-overdue && supabase functions deploy push-send
scripts.secrets: echo 'Run: supabase secrets set RESEND_API_KEY=... VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY=... VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY=... VAPID_EMAIL=... APP_URL=...'
